name: Norris Electric Cooperative
territory: Wayne, Edwards, Wabash, White, and Lawrence counties, southeastern Illinois

netMetering.policy: Net metering at retail rate for systems ≤ 40 kW
netMetering.notes: Illinois Net Metering Act (220 ILCS 5/16-107.5) applies; southeastern IL territory

interconnection.applicationFeeNotes: Residential ≤ 10 kW; systems > 10 kW require engineering review and may incur additional fees

incentives.notes: Illinois Shines (ABP) available; USDA REAP grants for agricultural members in rural SE Illinois
